heading: Establishment
label: 410vv–1 Establishment
notes: Amendments1998—Subsecs. (a), (b)(1). substituted “Marsh-Billings-Rockefeller” for “Marsh-Billings” wherever appearing.Pub. L. 105–277
amendments: Amendments1998—Subsecs. (a), (b)(1). substituted “Marsh-Billings-Rockefeller” for “Marsh-Billings” wherever appearing.Pub. L. 105–277

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: There is established as a unit of the National Park System the Marsh-Billings-Rockefeller National Historical Park in Windsor County, Vermont (hereinafter in this subchapter referred to as the “park”).

The park shall consist of a historic zone, including the Marsh-Billings-Rockefeller Mansion, surrounding buildings and a portion of the area known as “Mt. Tom”, comprising approximately 555 acres, and a protection zone, including the areas presently occupied by the Billings Farm and Museum, comprising approximately 88 acres, all as generally depicted on the map entitled “Marsh-Billings-Rockefeller National Historical Park Boundary Map” and dated .November 19, 1991
The map referred to in paragraph (1) shall be on file and available for public inspection in the appropriate offices of the National Park Service, Department of the Interior.
